name: Jaina
description: A frost Mage that can slow the entire enemy team.
title: Archmage
info: Once the apprentice of the Archmage Antonidas, Jaina Proudmoore led the survivors of Lordaeron to Kalimdor and founded the city of Theramore. Now, she serves the Alliance as a powerful voice fighting for reason and diplomacy.

Jaina.name: Frostbolt
Jaina.description: Deal 184 (+4% per level) damage and Chill the target.

Jaina.name: Blizzard
Jaina.description: Bombard an area with 3 waves of ice, dealing 142 (+4% per level) damage each. Damaged enemies are Chilled.

Jaina.name: Cone of Cold
Jaina.description: Deal 220 (+4% per level) damage and Chill targets.

Jaina.name: Summon Water Elemental
Jaina.description: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 (+4% per level) damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over 32 seconds.

Jaina.name: Ring of Frost
Jaina.description: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 (+4% per level) damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.

Jaina.name: Frostbite
Jaina.description: Jaina's Abilities Chill targets, Slowing them by 25% and amplifying damage taken from her Abilities by 50%. Lasts 4 seconds.  Quest: Deal Ability damage to Chilled Heroes.  Reward: Upon dealing 12000 damage, unlock the Improved Ice Block Ability, allowing Jaina to become temporarily Invulnerable.  Mythic Reward: Upon dealing 30000 damage, Ice Block upgrades to Ice Cold, allowing Jaina to move and cast while active.

Jaina.name: Improved Ice Block
Jaina.description: Activate to place Jaina in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 2.5 seconds. When this effect expires, nearby enemies are Chilled.

1.name: Winter's Reach
1.description: Increase the range and travel speed of Frostbolt by 30%.

1.name: Lingering Chill
1.description: Increase the duration of Chill from 4 seconds to 6 seconds.

1.name: Fingers of Frost
1.description: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to increase Jaina's Mana regeneration by 0.1 per second, up to 2 per second.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, the damage bonus from Frostbite is increased by 10%.

4.name: Frost Shards
4.description: Frostbolt will now pierce the first two targets.

4.name: Arcane Intellect
4.description: Dealing damage to a Chilled target returns Mana to Jaina. Basic Attacks return 5 Mana and Abilities return 20.  Passive: While above 75% Mana, Jaina gains 10% Spell Power.

4.name: Frost Armor
4.description: Enemies that attack Jaina are Chilled. Additionally, every 10 seconds, Jaina gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.

7.name: Ice Lance
7.description: Hitting a Chilled target with Frostbolt reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and restores 10 Mana.

7.name: Ice Floes
7.description: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by 100% and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, doubled against chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of 8 seconds per use.

7.name: Icefury Wand
7.description: Basic Attacks against Chilled enemies deal 50% more damage and lower the cooldown of Blizzard by 1.25 seconds. Doubled against enemy Heroes.

10.name: Ring of Frost
10.description: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 (+4% per level) damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.

10.name: Summon Water Elemental
10.description: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 (+4% per level) damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over 32 seconds.

13.name: Storm Front
13.description: Increase the cast range of Blizzard by 75% and its radius by 30%.

13.name: Ice Barrier
13.description: Gain a Shield for 25% of Ability damage dealt to Chilled targets. The shield lasts 4 seconds.

13.name: Icy Veins
13.description: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge 200% faster and reduce their Mana cost by 50% for 5 seconds.

16.name: Snowstorm
16.description: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by 50%. The damage of the third wave is increased by 100%.

16.name: Northern Exposure
16.description: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by 25 for 2 seconds, increasing their damage taken by 25%.

16.name: Numbing Blast
16.description: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for 0.75 seconds.

20.name: Cold Snap
20.description: The center area of Ring of Frost deals 310 (+4% per level) damage and Roots enemies after the outer ring expires. Each enemy Hero hit reduces its cooldown by 15 seconds.

20.name: Wintermute
20.description: Increases the cast range of Water Elemental by 40%, and the Water Elemental will now mimic Jaina's Basic Abilities for 40% damage.

20.name: Ice Blink
20.description: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.

20.name: Deep Chill
20.description: Frostbite's Chill can now stack a second time, slowing targets up to 40%.

abilities.name: Blizzard
abilities.description: Bombard an area with <c val="bfd4fd">3</c> waves of ice, dealing <c val="bfd4fd">142~~0.04~~</c> damage each. Damaged enemies are Chilled.

tooltipMarkup.JainaBlizzardSnowstormTalent: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,JainaBlizzardDamageChilled,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Snowstorm1Token].Modifier"/>%</c>. The damage of the third wave is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,JainaBlizzardDamageChilled,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Snowstorm2Tokens].Modifier"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.JainaBlizzardStormFrontTalent: Increase the cast range of Blizzard by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,JainaBlizzardStormFront,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,JainaBlizzard,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c> and its radius by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.JainaConeOfColdIceFloesTalent: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,JainaConeOfColdIceFloesModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse" precision="2"/></c> seconds, doubled against chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,JainaConeOfColdIceFloesModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*Behavior,JainaConeOfColdIceFloesTokenCounter,Max"/></c> seconds per use.
tooltipMarkup.JainaConeOfColdNorthernExposureTalent: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JainaConeofColdNorthernExposureArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*(-1)"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JainaConeofColdNorthernExposureArmorDecrease,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, increasing their damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JainaConeofColdNorthernExposureArmorDecrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus*(-1)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.JainaConeOfColdNumbingBlastTalent: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JainaConeOfColdNumbingBlastRoot,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.JainaFingersOfFrost: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to increase Jaina's Mana regeneration by per second, up to per second. Reward: After gathering Globes, the damage bonus from Frostbite is increased by %.

Basic Attacks return <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JainaArcaneIntellectBasicAttackManaRestore,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana and Abilities return <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JainaArcaneIntellectAbilityDamageManaRestore,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>While above <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Validator,JainaHasGTE75PercentMana,Value"Precision="2"/>%</c> Mana, Jaina gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,JainaArcaneIntellectSpellPower,Modification.DamageDealtFraction"/>%</c> Spell Power.
